Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment - Cross-Defendant Open Top Sightseeing Usa, Inc.
Off Calendar Jun-08-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Jeffrey Huron, 231.457.1800 for Defendant/Cross-defendant Dons Hotel Owner LP. (Courtcall)
Thi Hoang Ho, 231.457.1800 for Defendant/Cross-defendant Dons Hotel Owner LP. (Courtcall)
Lisa Parrish Schachne, 415.586.9001 for Plaintiff Open Top Sightseeing San Francisco, LLC. and Open Top Sightseeing USA, Inc. (Zoom)

Argued. Plaintiff requests a continuance re: to prevent a writ from being issued and further briefing. The Court asks if the Plaintiff is still in possession and not paying rent. Ms. Parrish Schachne states that the Plaintiff is not doing business in the building. mr. Huron informs the Court that the matter has been fully briefed twice and that Defendant is still in business and collecting money but not paying rent. The Courts asks Ms. Ms. Parrish Schachne to clarify. She stated that Open Top Sightseeing San Francisco, LLC. is operating at another location and that they still have the keys.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: CROSS COMPLAINANT DONS HOTEL OWNER LP'S Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order, Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment (Cross-Defendant Open Top Sightseeing USA, Inc.)is GRANTED as requested. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
